---
title: "Blog"
description: "Longer, slower writing about research workflows, epidemiological methods, tools, and the craft of doing science."
listing:
  id: blog-posts
  contents:
    - "blog/*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: [date, title, reading-time]
  filter-ui: true
  categories: true
  date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"
  fields: [date, title, reading-time, description, categories]
  feed:
    title: "Kostadin Kostadinov — Blog"
    description: "Essays on research workflows, epidemiological methods, and scientific tooling."
    type: full
toc: false
---

This is where I write at length. Where [Epi News](epinews.qmd) is a regular surveillance digest, the blog is slower and more personal: how I organise projects, which methods I trust and why, the tools that survive contact with real work, and the occasional argument about how research should be done.

Posts are written in Quarto, so code, equations and figures are part of the text rather than screenshots of it. You can subscribe to the [RSS feed](blog.xml), filter by category, or search the archive below.

::: {#blog-posts .blog-listing}
:::
